title: The Naval Ravikant Podcast (excerpt)
raw_text: Happiness is a choice you make and a skill you develop. The mind can be trained just like the body can be trained. Desire is a contract you make with yourself to be unhappy until you get what you want. I think most of our habits, good and bad, are just a proxy for happiness. We think if we do this thing we will be happy, but happiness is something you have to practice, it's a state that you have to learn to just be in.

chunks.text: Happiness is a choice you make and a skill you develop. The mind can be trained just like the body can be trained. Desire is a contract you make with yourself to be unhappy until you get what you want.

I think most of our habits, good and bad, are just a proxy for happiness. We think if we do this thing we will be happy, but happiness is something you have to practice, it's a state that you have to learn to just be in.
